activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: The r'ea'rview mirror must be adjusted properly in order to see what’s behind.
The engine shouldn’t be above the required emissions t'ie'r before final registration.
The lin'ea'r guide should ensure smooth and accurate movement of the injector assembly during calibration.
The P'ie'rburg valve mustn’t leak vacuum during engine idle testing.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.

activity_2_d.text:

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கவனமாகக் கேட்டு, இடைநிறுத்தத்தின் போது பதிலளிக்கவும், அதன் பிறகு உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரிப் பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிட்டுப் பார்க்கவும்.

tables: I am going to work next Monday.
I play the piano every morning.
I am going to play the piano tomorrow morning.
I am going to rest this weekend.

example_dialogues.text_a: I have a bad headache today.
example_dialogues.text_b: That doesn’t sound good. Did you sleep well last night?
example_dialogues.text_c: No, I slept very late and woke up early.
example_dialogues.text_d: You should take a rest, stay in a quiet place, and drink enough water.

example_dialogues.text_a: My stomach hurts badly this afternoon.
example_dialogues.text_b: That doesn’t sound good. Did you eat any street food at lunch?
example_dialogues.text_c: Yes, I ate a spicy fish bun and some oily manioca chips.
example_dialogues.text_d: You should eat light meals, avoid spicy food, and take a short rest.

example_dialogues.text_a: I feel very tired and hungry today.
example_dialogues.text_b: That doesn’t sound good. Did you work overtime yesterday?
example_dialogues.text_c: Yes, I stayed late and skipped my evening meal.
example_dialogues.text_d: You should slow down today, take a short rest and eat something as soon as possible.

keywords.word: drink tea and check my messages

dialogues.text_a: My eyes feel sore and dry today.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds serious. Did you work on the computer all morning?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, I stared at the screen for hours this morning.
dialogues.text_d: You should take short breaks, avoid screens for some time and wash your face with cold water.

dialogues.text_a: I feel weak and shaky right now.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds serious. Did you drink enough water today?
dialogues.text_c: No, I forgot to drink water during work.
dialogues.text_d: You should drink some Jeevani, take short breaks and buy a big bottle of water as soon as possible.

dialogues.text_a: My back hurts a lot after work today.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds serious. Did you lift anything heavy?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, I lifted several boxes by myself.
dialogues.text_d: You should lie down, apply some pain-relieving ointment and ask for help next time.

dialogues.text_a: I find it difficult to breathe this morning.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds worrying. Did you work in the dusty area this morning?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, the floor in the workshop was very dusty and it wasn’t ventilated properly.
dialogues.text_d: You should get some fresh air, inform the supervisor and wear a mask next time.

dialogues.text_a: I have a bad toothache this morning.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds worrying. Did you bite on anything hard?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, I had a beef stew and bit on the bone by accident.
dialogues.text_d: You should take a break, have some panadol and see the dentist as soon as possible.

dialogues.text_a: I have a bad earache today.
dialogues.text_b: That sounds worrying. Did you listen to loud music last night?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, I went to a party and they played the drums very loudly there.
dialogues.text_d: You should avoid using earphones for the moment, take a pain killer and see an ENT doctor as soon as possible.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: These days, many office workers in Colombo __________ from home because of traffic congestion.
I __________ the supervisor about the breakout yesterday but he did not take any action.
Look at the sky — it __________ heavily within the next few minutes.
She usually __________ her emails once a day, but today she __________ keep checking them often, for an important message.
We __________ the site inspection this afternoon, so please bring your safety helmet.
He __________ drive fast on this road because it’s narrow and very crowded.
The instructor __________ the safety rules a while ago, and all the trainees listened carefully.
__________ you __________ the equipment checklist every morning before starting work?
They __________ attend the meeting tomorrow morning because the manager is unavailable.
Last week, the team __________ a serious delay due to unexpected power cuts.

activity_b.text: These days, many office workers in Colombo are working from home because of traffic congestion.
I informed the supervisor about the breakout yesterday but he did not take any action.
Look at the sky — it is going to rain heavily within the next few minutes.
She usually checks her emails once a day, but today she has to keep checking them often, for an important message.
We are doing the site inspection this afternoon, so please bring your safety helmet.
He shouldn’t drive fast on this road because it’s narrow and very crowded.
The instructor explained the safety rules a while ago, and all the trainees listened carefully.
Do you go through the equipment checklist every morning before starting work?
They aren’t going to attend the meeting tomorrow morning because the manager is unavailable.
Last week, the team experienced a serious delay due to unexpected power cuts.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: Why was the instructor concerned about the engine being left running?
Questions.answer: It creates a serious safety risk in the workshop area.
options: It creates a serious safety risk for the service bay area.
It creates a serious safety risk in the workshop area.

Questions.question: What was the main problem with the wheel nuts?
Questions.answer: They were tightened below the specified torque value.
options: They were tightened before the vehicle was released safely.
They were tightened below the specified torque value.

Questions.question: What mistake did the trainee make when tightening the wheel nuts?
Questions.answer: He set the torque wrench incorrectly and did not recheck the value.
options: He set the value incorrectly and did not recheck the torque wrench.
He unfastened the torque wrench incorrectly.
He set the torque wrench incorrectly and did not recheck the value.

Questions.question: Why is an oil spill under a vehicle dangerous?
Questions.answer: It creates a slipping hazard for people working nearby.
options: It stains the workshop floor permanently.
It creates a slipping hazard for people working nearby.
People working nearby can’t do the housekeeping without slipping.

Questions.question: Which response best reflects professional acceptance of an apology in a workshop context?
Questions.answer: “Thank you for explaining. Please correct it and follow the procedure.”
options: “Thank you for explaining. Please correct it and follow the procedure.”
“That should never happen in this workshop.”
“This problem can be ignored for now.”

activity_b.text: When I inspected the service bay, I noticed the engine was still running and the vehicle was unattended.
That creates a clear safety risk in the workshop area.
You normally follow shutdown procedures, so I would like to understand what caused this situation.
I’m very sorry about that, sir.
I stepped away briefly to collect tools and did not switch off the engine as required.
Thank you for highlighting the issue.
I will ensure the engine is fully shut down and the vehicle is secured before leaving the bay in the future.
These wheel nuts do not meet the torque values specified in the service manual.
They are under-tightened, which means the vehicle cannot be released safely.
Accuracy is critical in Automobile Technology work, so we need to address how this happened.
I apologise for the mistake, sir.
I set the torque wrench incorrectly and did not recheck the specification before tightening.
I appreciate your guidance.
I will carefully confirm torque values before carrying out any fastening work in the future.
There is engine oil spilled beneath the vehicle, and the area has not been cleaned or marked.
This creates a slipping hazard for anyone moving through the workshop.
Maintaining good housekeeping is an essential part of automotive safety practice.
I regret the oversight, sir.
Thank you for bringing it to my attention promptly.
I will clean the spill immediately and make sure any fluid leaks are dealt with without delay from now on.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.
